description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.8-buster Docker image with a before_script executing "pip install -r requirements.txt". Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a job named "test" that runs the command "mkdocs build --strict --verbose --site-dir test", saves the generated "test" directory as an artifact, and is triggered only when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME is not the default branch. In the deploy stage add a job named "pages" that runs "mkdocs build --strict --verbose", publishes the "public" directory as a pages artifact, and runs only when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME equals the default branch.
